sections.paragraph: an unused root. Arabic خَرِىءَ to do one’s easement, a low word rather than a decent one. Hence whenever its derivative occurs in the sacred text, the Hebrew critics have placed [what they deemed] a more decent word in the margin. See מַחֲרָאֹות , חֲרֵי יֹונִים for חַרְאֵי יֹונִים, and-
